parents.subject: LU-13006 jobid: enhance tests to check per-session jobids.

commit.subject: LU-13963 kernel: new kernel [SLES15 SP2 5.3.18-24.15.1]
commit.message:
LU-13963 kernel: new kernel [SLES15 SP2 5.3.18-24.15.1]

This patch makes changes to support new SLES15 SP2 release
with kernel 5.3.18-24.15.1 for Lustre client.

Test-Parameters: trivial \
env=SANITY_EXCEPT="100 130 136 817" \
clientdistro=sles15sp2 serverdistro=el7.8 \
testlist=sanity

Change-Id: I00f8fb1cc3c61700f1abbc95d18d291c6841a29e
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
